positive: A whimsical, highly stylized astronaut floating through a vibrant nebula garden. The astronaut, depicted with a glossy, retro-futuristic suit, is surrounded by bioluminescent, stylized flora and gentle, floating geometric shapes. The overall scene should have a strong Alphonse Mucha influence mixed with minimalist Mid-Century Modern poster art. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. The color palette should be deep indigo, vibrant magenta, electric teal, and gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, highly scalable for apparel printing, with clear visual separation between foreground, middle ground, and background elements. Crisp linework, vector art quality, excellent symmetry.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, noise, out of frame, messy, complex background, photorealistic, grayscale
